text:
The verification loop makes sense given you can't access that inbox — this needs identity verification through our security team before the email can be changed, since we can't bypass that check from the support side.

Reply with the email currently on the account and the new one you want to use, plus any details that confirm you own the account (name, phone on file, recent bet activity). Security ops will follow up to verify and complete the change.

Novig Support
